column5: Chapter Title (Mandatory)
column7: Question ID (Mandatory and Unique, for example: 1.1, 1.2, Etc)
column10: Answer Type (Mandatory, one of the following options: 1 for Open Answer, 2 for Dropdown - Single Select, 3 for Dropdown - Single Select - Open answer, 4 for Date, 5 for Dropdown - Multiple Select, 6 for Dropdown - Multiple Select - Open answer)
column11: Dropdown Options (Mandatory if column G is Dropdown. List options for the dropdown separated by a pipe character, for example: Yes|No|Undefined)
column12: DropDown Warnings (Optional, for every option on column H you can define a message, for example: Great|Oh|Think twice)
column13: Dropdown Scoring (Mandatory, set this to 1 if you want to enable scoring for this question. Otherwise set to 0)
column14: Dropdown Option Score (Mandatory if J is set to 1, set the score of the question as an integer positive number, for example 10)
column15: Dropdown Option Score Multiplier (Mandatory if J is set to 1. For every option of the dropdown in column H define an integer positive number that will be multiplied by the value on column K, for example: 1|2|10)
column16: Dropdown Option Show another Question (Optional and only possible if column G is dropdown.For every option in column H you can define one or more question IDs from column D to be shown when the option is selected. For example: 1.2 1.6||6.7 would display questions 1.2 and 1.6 if the first option is selected, none if the second is selected and 6.7 if the third option is selected)
column17: Question Comments & Attachments (Mandatory, select 0 if you do not want to show this option or 1 if you want to let users provide comments and attachments for each question)

column3: The Information Security Management System (ISMS) applies to Eramba Limited and covers the design, development, operation, hosting, and support of the Eramba software platform provided to customers as a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) solution. The scope includes: - The Eramba GRC software application developed and maintained by Eramba Limited. - Cloud infrastructure, platforms, and services used to host and operate the Eramba SaaS platform. - Supporting systems and tools used for development, deployment, monitoring, support, and maintenance. - Information assets processed, stored, or transmitted by the Eramba platform, including customer data. - Business processes supporting the SaaS service, including product development, operations, customer support, sales, and internal administration. - Employees and contractors who access or manage systems and information within scope. - Interfaces and dependencies with third-party service providers supporting the delivery and operation of the Eramba SaaS platform. The ISMS does not include customer-managed environments or systems not operated or controlled by Eramba Limited, except where explicitly defined through contractual or operational interfaces. The ISMS scope is reviewed periodically and whenever significant organizational, technical, or regulatory changes occur. ---

The scope includes: - The Eramba GRC software application developed and maintained by Eramba Limited. - Cloud infrastructure, platforms, and services used to host and operate the Eramba SaaS platform. - Supporting systems and tools used for development, deployment, monitoring, support, and maintenance. - Information assets processed, stored, or transmitted by the Eramba platform, including customer data. - Business processes supporting the SaaS service, including product development, operations, customer support, sales, and internal administration. - Employees and contractors who access or manage systems and information within scope. - Interfaces and dependencies with third-party service providers supporting the delivery and operation of the Eramba SaaS platform. The ISMS does not include customer-managed environments or systems not operated or controlled by Eramba Limited, except where explicitly defined through contractual or operational interfaces. The ISMS scope is reviewed periodically and whenever significant organizational, technical, or regulatory changes occur. ---
